log_snapshot.scope: complete container log through all three fresh zero-tolerance 120K cases and the last pre-stop health check; the controller log separately proves stop and cleanup

http_response_scan.interpretation: The 153 chat responses are exactly 30 frozen prewarm prompts, 120 scored responses, and 3 admitted context cases. Calibration-only seed qualification contributes tokenize calls but no chat response.

cgroup_event_records.interpretation: These container-log records are startup/cache-control snapshots. The separate watchdog trace is authoritative for full-lane soft memory.high events.

generic_skipped.interpretation: No uppercase SKIPPED lines occurred in the current integrated run; replay, gate, and draft-prefetch skip patterns were also zero.

selected_context_receipts.interpretation: All three exact retrieval requests exhibited a nonzero interim residue window and then closed with a zero-replay, zero-residue latest window. This is empirical retrieval evidence, not proof that every internal forward was miss-free.

host_wide_reclaim_counters.attribution_note: These counters are host-wide and are not exclusively attributable to the evaluation cgroup.

memory_watchdog.interpretation: The integrated 128K lane retained more than 4.29 GB of hard cgroup headroom with no swap, hard-limit, or OOM event. File-cache growth crossed the soft memory.high boundary narrowly and produced observable reclaim; those events are intentionally not reported as zero.

kpi_semantics.window_boundary: Residue and replay fields describe the latest 64-step KPI window, not cumulative correctness.
kpi_semantics.residue_boundary: Residue records second-order misses exposed after mandatory first-order fetch and replay. Under the default continuation threshold, those experts are available to later steps while their current-step contribution remains zero.
kpi_semantics.unrestored_boundary: Zero unrestored experts establishes fetch/store liveness. It does not establish a miss-free forward, bit-identical logits, or identical token streams across boots.

sanitization_note: Topology-specific and private runtime provenance identifiers are intentionally omitted.
